one_time_description: Carrier Sekani Tribal Council - Pathway Forward 2.0 settlement of $18,446,490 plus treaty negotiation loan forgiveness of $1,673,340
economic_notes: Operates grocery store (Sana'aih Market), logging (Nak'al Koh Logging), gas station (Nahounli Creek Gas Bar), lumber mill (Tl'oh Forest Products), and multiple other business entities. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with unknown future financial impact noted.
notes: Large one-time receipt: Carrier Sekani Tribal Council Pathway Forward 2.0 of $18,446,490 and treaty loan forgiveness of $1,673,340 recorded in Other Income, driving the exceptional $21.6M surplus. Complex consolidation: 7 entities fully consolidated (including 2 proportionately consolidated partnerships), 13 entities on modified equity basis. Prior year audited by a different auditor. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event. Expenses_salaries_total extracted from segmented information wages and benefits line ($4,598,478). Annual debt service represents repayment of long-term debt per cash flow statement. Total revenue per income statement = $38,425,140 band operations + $9,399,694 GBE = $47,824,834.
